headline: Aerospace Aftermarket Stocks Rise Amid Boeing, Airbus Delays
summary: Aerospace aftermarket stocks are soaring as Boeing and Airbus' production delays prolong the life of planes currently flying.

headline: WESCO, Howmet, Lennox, Avis Budget Group, and Regal Rexnord Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the morning session after markets rebounded, driven by stabilizing oil prices and reports that President Trump was considering an end to the military conflict in Iran.
